mapper.sql: select distinct c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.category, c.grade_scope, c.teacher_user_id, c.teacher_name, c.campus, c.week_day, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.max_capacity, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.status = '0') as current_capacity, c.status, c.description, c.ai_notice, c.ai_suggestion, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, 'N' as enrolled, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.status = '0') as enroll_count from edu_course c

select distinct c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.category, c.grade_scope, c.teacher_user_id, c.teacher_name, c.campus, c.week_day, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.max_capacity, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.status = '0') as current_capacity, c.status, c.description, c.ai_notice, c.ai_suggestion, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.status = '0') as enroll_count
, case when exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.student_user_id = #{params.currentUserId} and e.status = '0') then 'Y' else 'N' end as enrolled
, case when exists ( select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.parent_user_id = #{params.currentUserId}
and e.student_user_id = #{params.targetStudentUserId}
and e.status = '0' ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as enrolled
, 'N' as enrolled
from edu_course c

choose.when: and c.status = '0' and c.start_date is not null and c.start_date > curdate()
and c.status = '0' and c.end_date is not null and c.end_date < curdate()
and c.status = '0' and (c.start_date is null or c.start_date <= curdate()) and (c.end_date is null or c.end_date >= curdate())

where.if: and ( c.grade_scope is null or c.grade_scope = '' or c.grade_scope regexp '一年级|二年级|三年级|四年级|五年级|六年级' )
and ( c.grade_scope is null or c.grade_scope = '' or c.grade_scope regexp '七年级|八年级|九年级' )

if.test: _parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and params.studentGrade != null and params.studentGrade != ''

where.if: and (c.grade_scope is null or c.grade_scope = '' or find_in_set(#{params.studentGrade}, c.grade_scope))

if.test: _parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and params.onlyMine != null and params.onlyMine and params.currentRole == 'student'

where.if: and exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.student_user_id = #{params.currentUserId})

if.test: _parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and params.onlyMine != null and params.onlyMine and params.currentRole == 'parent'
_parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and enrolled != null and enrolled != '' and params.currentRole == 'student'

choose.when: and exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.student_user_id = #{params.currentUserId} and e.status = '0')
and not exists (select 1 from edu_course_enrollment e where e.course_id = c.course_id and e.student_user_id = #{params.currentUserId} and e.status = '0')

if.test: _parameter != null and _parameter.getClass().name != 'java.lang.Long' and enrolled != null and enrolled != '' and params.currentRole == 'parent'

mapper.select:
order by c.create_time desc, c.course_id desc
limit #{params.limitTop}

order by enroll_count desc, c.course_id desc
limit #{params.limitTop}
mapper.insert: insert into edu_course (course_code, course_name, category, grade_scope, teacher_user_id, teacher_name, campus, week_day, start_time, end_time, start_date, end_date, max_capacity, current_capacity, status, description, ai_notice, ai_suggestion, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{category}, #{gradeScope}, #{teacherUserId}, #{teacherName}, #{campus}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxCapacity}, #{currentCapacity}, #{status}, #{description}, #{aiNotice}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update edu_course set ai_notice = #{aiNotice}, update_time = sysdate() where course_id = #{courseId}
update edu_course set ai_suggestion = #{aiSuggestion}, update_time = sysdate() where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.delete:
delete from edu_course where course_id in
#{courseId}
mapper.select: select count(distinct teacher_user_id) from edu_course where status = '0'
